changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → P6 scenery or architecture teaching
changes.before: Above them, the blade sat in a box and still managed to teach the palace its name.
changes.after: Above them, the blade sat in a box, and its cold had already worked through the palace.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → P5 objects wanting, refusing, or deciding
changes.before: No. It depended on whether the room wanted truth before it arrived.
changes.after: No. It depended on whether anyone in the room wanted truth before it arrived.

changes.feedbackRef: A → recurring-prose-tics.md → Tic 5 eye/gaze repertoire exhaustion
changes.before: That got his eyes up.
changes.after: That pulled his attention up.

changes.feedbackRef: A → negation-addiction-hunting-guide.md → P4 minimizer pivot
changes.before: That reached him. Not far, but enough to make him feel it and refuse it.
changes.after: That reached him far enough to make him feel it and refuse it.

changes.feedbackRef: A → negation-addiction-hunting-guide.md → P2 fragment pivot
changes.before: Not imagination now.
changes.after: Real now.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → P1 geography pressed into service
changes.before: Even Stratholme served her.
changes.after: Ashcombe turned even Stratholme to her use.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → P2 infrastructure asking or finding
changes.before: Then the lid came up and the room found the edge of its wrongness.
changes.after: Then the lid came up and everyone in the room felt the edge of its wrongness.

changes.feedbackRef: A → recurring-prose-tics.md → Tic 5 eye/gaze repertoire exhaustion
changes.before: Sylvanas looked to Jaina despite herself.
changes.after: Sylvanas turned to Jaina despite herself.

changes.feedbackRef: A → negation-addiction-hunting-guide.md → P2 fragment pivot
changes.before: No tremor now. Worse.
changes.after: Worse now.

changes.feedbackRef: A → negation-addiction-hunting-guide.md → P3 source-swap pivot
changes.before: He hesitated. Not from doubt. From knowing exactly what answer was wanted and disliking how near it stood to the truth.
changes.after: He hesitated from knowing exactly which answer they wanted and disliking how near it stood to the truth.

changes.feedbackRef: A → recurring-prose-tics.md → Tic 5 eye/gaze repertoire exhaustion
changes.before: Jaina finally looked at her.
changes.after: Jaina finally turned to Ashcombe.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → P4 institutions or abstractions self-deceiving
changes.before: By the time Uther was called, the chamber was ready to believe anything that left blame outside itself.
changes.after: By the time Uther was called, the people in the chamber were ready to believe anything that left blame elsewhere.

changes.feedbackRef: A → recurring-prose-tics.md → Tic 5 eye/gaze repertoire exhaustion
changes.before: Thornton's eyes lifted from the papers more than once.
changes.after: Thornton checked the room over the tops of his papers more than once.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → P2 infrastructure carrying collective motion
changes.before: When he rose to object, the whole room shifted toward him.
changes.after: When he rose to object, every head in the chamber turned toward him.

changes.feedbackRef: A → recurring-prose-tics.md → Tic 5 eye/gaze repertoire exhaustion
changes.before: Thornton did not look up from the bench.
changes.after: Thornton stayed bent over the bench.

changes.feedbackRef: A → negation-addiction-hunting-guide.md → P3 source-swap pivot
changes.before: Not because he lacked authority. Because the one he needed had not been given.
changes.after: Because the authority he needed had not been given.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → P2 infrastructure asking or listening
changes.before: The room listened to the state, not the sister.
changes.after: The listeners heard the state, not the sister.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → P4 institutions or abstractions self-deceiving
changes.before: The stretch a court order might imagine while men wrote letters and filed seals had already burned away.
changes.after: Whatever time men with seals might imagine while they wrote letters and filed orders had already burned away.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → P9 nominalized thought given agency
changes.before: A plan tried to form under her ribs.
changes.after: She began piecing together a plan under her ribs.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → P5 objects wanting, refusing, or deciding
changes.before: If there is a room left willing to hear.
changes.after: If there is anyone left willing to hear.

changes.feedbackRef: A → recurring-prose-tics.md → Tic 5 eye/gaze repertoire exhaustion
changes.before: Sylvanas looked at him.
changes.after: Sylvanas faced him.

changes.feedbackRef: A → recurring-prose-tics.md → Tic 5 eye/gaze repertoire exhaustion
changes.before: Then he looked at Sylvanas one last time.
changes.after: Then he turned back to Sylvanas one last time.
